name: Shubham Kumar
my_twin: I'm building Stakrid — a last-mile logistics startup — while simultaneously doing R&D on Symbiote-X, a four-layer neuro-symbolic AI governance architecture for autonomous systems like drones and rovers. I care deeply about making AI that doesn't hallucinate its way into bad decisions, especially in high-stakes environments. When I'm not shipping APIs or training models, I'm at events like AI Impact Summit pitching to defence tech stakeholders or figuring out how to get a grant from iDEX. Final year, builder — doing all of it at once.
